sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) noise, tumult (Raufchen, Raffeln), e.g. of chariots (Geraffel), Nah 3:2 Jer 47:3 of horses running, Job 39:24 of battle (Geräufch), Isa 9:4 Jer 10:22 but especially crashing in an earthquake; hence an earthquake, 1Ki 19:11 Amo 1:1 Zec 14:5.

(2) trembling, Eze 12:18 brandishing of a spear, Job 41:21.
